subcodes.title: Words to Mr Crewe of Newfoundland, spoken on 1913-03-03
subcodes.first_line: O Thou Kind God! We are Thy humble servants; endear us in Thy Kingdom! We are poor; enrich us through Thy heavenly Treasury! We are ignorant, suffer us to become informed
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @love of God, @spiritual transformation, @The Holy Spirit
